mechanism_narrative: Rising real GDP growth combined with expanding retail sales indicates strengthening aggregate demand, which boosts corporate earnings expectations and drives positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns are negative or flat when GDPC1 and RSAFS both show positive 3-month momentum.

mechanism_narrative: An acceleration in the federal funds rate above 0.25 percentage points over a quarter compresses equity valuations by raising the discount rate, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the subsequent 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 60d returns remain positive when FEDFUNDS accelerates by >0.25pp while CPIAUCSL stays below 2.5%.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in nonfarm payrolls and a declining unemployment rate signals a tightening labor market that supports wage growth and consumer spending, driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 5d returns are negative when PAYEMS rises >100k and UNRATE falls >0.2pp in the same month.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production indicates expanding manufacturing capacity and healthy supply-side momentum, which lifts S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days specifically during periods of stable inflation.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns are negative when INDPRO rises >1.5% month-over-month and CPIAUCSL is below 2.0%.

mechanism_narrative: A drop in housing starts below 600 thousand units signals weakening construction demand and broader economic slowdown, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 60d returns are positive when HOUST declines below 600k while PAYEMS remains above 130k.

mechanism_narrative: Low federal funds rates combined with low inflation readings indicate accommodative real monetary policy, which supports equity valuations and drives positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns are negative when FEDFUNDS is below 0.5% and CPIAUCSL is below 2.2%.

mechanism_narrative: Consistent month-over-month growth in total nonfarm payrolls reflects sustained economic expansion, which systematically lifts S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 5d returns are negative in >50% of months where PAYEMS increases by at least 150k.

mechanism_narrative: Real GDP growth exceeding 3.0% annualized signals robust economic momentum that expands corporate profit margins, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the subsequent 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 60d returns are negative when GDPC1 annualized growth exceeds 3.0% and CPIAUCSL remains below 2.5%.
